channel.title: Antonio V. Franco
channel.description: Recent content on Antonio V. Franco

item.title: FUVEST and ML: If You Are Poor, Do Not Put Your Child in a Private School
item.description: Machine learning analysis shows public school students now represent 59% of elite university admissions in Brazil. Free educational resources have broken the private school monopoly on exam preparation.

item.title: When Document Order Changes the Verdict: What the NOA-Star Simulation Reveals About Transient Classification
item.description: The NOA-Star simulation of Stable-RAG on astronomical transient classification achieves 98.9% accuracy across 90 events, but the single error and the low-stability events reveal more than the successes. Stability scores expose where reasoning is fragile, even when the answer is correct.

item.title: Why Specialized SLMs Are the Standard From 2026 Onward
item.description: Specialized Small Language Models (SLMs) are replacing giant commercial LLMs as the standard for enterprise AI in 2026. Open-source SLMs deliver superior domain accuracy, lower infrastructure costs, and full data sovereignty — while LLM quality has plateaued.

item.title: Can Memory Make an AI Worse? My Benchmark with Qwen3.5-9B and Stellar Classification
item.description: Benchmark reveals naive ReasoningBank memory reduces accuracy by 22pp on SDSS stellar classification. RB-EC with consolidation, pruning, and class-balanced retrieval restores baseline performance.

item.title: Spectral Classification Stability Engine: From Idea to Results
item.description: Building SCSE to apply Stable-RAG's spectral clustering to astronomical SDSS classification. Documents 16 version iterations across Kaggle, RunPod A40, and A100, achieving 47% PSS reduction via DPO.

item.title: Stable-RAG Benchmark: Your RAG System Lies Depending on Document Order.
item.description: Benchmark comparing conventional RAG vs Stable-RAG reveals that reordering retrieved documents causes hallucination. Stable-RAG reduces Permutation Sensitivity Rate by 37.8% using spectral clustering and DPO alignment on Qwen3-4B.

item.title: RAG with Open-Source LLMs: Why You're Paying Too Much to Hand Your Data to Someone Else
item.description: Cost analysis and data sovereignty comparison of open-source vs commercial LLMs for RAG. Self-hosted Qwen3.5, DeepSeek, and GLM models match commercial quality at 10x lower cost with full data control.

item.title: Location
item.description: Professor Dr von Igelfeld's mailing and office addresses at the Institute of Romance Philology.

item.title: Office Hours
item.description: Schedule and location for Professor Dr von Igelfeld's office hours.

item.title: Your Inner Hedgehog
item.description: This paper describes the inner hedgehog, a psychological condition widespread in academia. Published in the Journal of Socio-Experimental Psychology, 2021.

item.title: List of Irregular Verbs Across Romance Languages
item.description: This dataset contains all irregular verbs in known Romance languages.

item.title: Unusual Uses For Olive Oil
item.description: This paper reviews unusual uses for olive oil throughout the Mediterranean world. Published in the Journal of Oleic Science, 2013.

item.title: The Finer Points of Sausage Dogs
item.description: This paper studies the pulmonary efficiency of sausage dogs. Published in the Journal of Canine Science, 2004.

item.title: Lectures at the Villa of Reduced Circumstances
item.description: This graduate course presents classical results in Romance philology.

item.title: Portugese Irregular Verbs
item.description: This book discusses Portugese irregular verbs in great details.

item.title: Profanity in Early Irish
item.description: This undergraduate course discusses profanity in Early Irish.
